triggered_axioms.statement: The absence of objection is not the presence of commitment.

self_checks.description: Is a specific person named as owner?
self_checks.reason: No explicit verbal commitment found. Only emoji reactions (👍) on async video.

self_checks.description: Is there a deadline or checkpoint?

generated_judgment.recommended_action: Request explicit written confirmation from the intended owner before treating this as committed work.
generated_judgment.reasoning_summary: The team reviewed the Loom proposal via async video. 4 members reacted with 👍. However, per ax-absence-not-commitment, emoji reactions do not constitute operational commitment. No one explicitly stated 'I will do this.' Classification: UNRESOLVED.
